# FlipMyCase — Free Online Text Tools (Full Reference)

> https://flipmycase.com

FlipMyCase is a suite of 75+ free, browser-based text tools for developers and writers. All processing happens client-side using JavaScript — no text is sent to any server. No signup required, no usage limits. Built with Next.js and hosted on Vercel.

## Case Converter (Homepage)

The main tool at https://flipmycase.com converts text between 13+ formats simultaneously. Paste text once and see every format instantly.

### Supported Formats
- UPPERCASE — All letters capitalized
- lowercase — All letters in lowercase
- Title Case — First letter of each major word capitalized
- Sentence case — First letter of each sentence capitalized
- camelCase — No spaces, first word lowercase, subsequent words capitalized (JavaScript variables)
- PascalCase — No spaces, every word capitalized (class names, React components)
- snake_case — Words separated by underscores, all lowercase (Python, Ruby)
- kebab-case — Words separated by hyphens, all lowercase (URLs, CSS classes)
- CONSTANT_CASE — Words separated by underscores, all uppercase (constants)
- dot.case — Words separated by dots, all lowercase
- Alternating case — Letters alternate between upper and lower
- Inverse case — Swaps the case of every letter
- URL Slug — Lowercase, hyphens, no special characters

### Example
Input: "Hello World Example Text"
- UPPERCASE → "HELLO WORLD EXAMPLE TEXT"
- lowercase → "hello world example text"
- Title Case → "Hello World Example Text"
- camelCase → "helloWorldExampleText"
- PascalCase → "HelloWorldExampleText"
- snake_case → "hello_world_example_text"
- kebab-case → "hello-world-example-text"
- CONSTANT_CASE → "HELLO_WORLD_EXAMPLE_TEXT"
- URL Slug → "hello-world-example-text"

### Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Is this text case converter really free?
A: Yes. The tool is completely free with no signup, no account, and no usage limits. It runs in your browser.

Q: Does this tool store or send my text anywhere?
A: No. All conversions happen in your browser using JavaScript. Your text never leaves your device. The tool saves your input to localStorage so refreshing the page does not lose your work.

Q: What is the difference between camelCase and PascalCase?
A: camelCase starts with a lowercase letter (userName), while PascalCase starts with an uppercase letter (UserName). camelCase is common for JavaScript variables. PascalCase is common for class names and React components.

Q: What is a slug and when should I use one?
A: A slug is a URL-friendly version of a string. It uses lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. Use slugs for blog post URLs, product page URLs, and any web address that needs to be human-readable.

Q: What is the difference between kebab-case and snake_case?
A: kebab-case uses hyphens between words (my-variable) and is common in URLs and CSS class names. snake_case uses underscores (my_variable) and is common in Python, Ruby, and database column names.

Q: Can I use this tool on my phone?
A: Yes. The tool is fully responsive and works on any device with a modern browser. Paste text, tap a copy button, and paste the result into your app.

Q: What is CONSTANT_CASE used for?
A: CONSTANT_CASE (also called SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE) uses all uppercase letters with underscores. It is the standard convention for constants in languages like JavaScript, Python, Java, and C.

---

## All Tools — Detailed Descriptions

### Text Case & Formatting

- [Case Converter](https://flipmycase.com): Convert text between UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case, camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, CONSTANT_CASE, dot.case, alternating case, inverse case, and URL slugs. Paste text once, see every format, copy with one click.

- [Text Cleaner](https://flipmycase.com/text-cleaner): Remove extra spaces, line breaks, tabs, smart quotes, non-breaking spaces, and zero-width characters from messy text. Useful for cleaning text pasted from PDFs, Word documents, and web pages.

- [Toggle Case Converter](https://flipmycase.com/toggle-case-converter): Convert text to alternating caps (tOgGlE cAsE) where each letter switches between upper and lower case. Popular for mocking memes and sarcastic internet text.

- [SpongeBob Case Converter](https://flipmycase.com/spongebob-case-converter): Convert text to the SpongeBob mocking meme format with random-looking alternating uppercase and lowercase. Creates the classic "mocking SpongeBob" text style for social media.

- [Snake vs Kebab Converter](https://flipmycase.com/snake-kebab-converter): Convert between snake_case (underscores) and kebab-case (hyphens) with a side-by-side comparison. Includes guidance on which naming convention to use in different programming contexts.

- [Text Sorter](https://flipmycase.com/text-sorter): Sort text lines alphabetically (A-Z or Z-A), numerically, by line length, or shuffle randomly. Options to remove duplicates, trim whitespace, and ignore case during sorting.

- [Text Reverser](https://flipmycase.com/text-reverser): Reverse text by characters (spell backwards), words, or lines. Also creates mirror text. Useful for puzzles, creative writing, and data manipulation.

- [Duplicate Line Remover](https://flipmycase.com/duplicate-line-remover): Remove duplicate lines from lists, CSV data, and log files. Supports case-insensitive matching, trimming whitespace, and sorting results. Shows duplicate count statistics.

- [Text Repeater](https://flipmycase.com/text-repeater): Repeat any text up to 1000 times with custom separators between repetitions. Options to number each repetition. Useful for test data generation and filler text.

- [Plain Text Converter](https://flipmycase.com/plain-text-converter): Strip all formatting from text — removes HTML tags, converts smart quotes and em dashes to plain equivalents, and normalizes whitespace. Outputs clean plain text ready for any context.

- [Add Line Numbers](https://flipmycase.com/add-line-numbers): Add sequential line numbers to text with customizable start number, separator format, and zero-padding options. Can also remove existing line numbers from numbered text.

- [Find & Replace](https://flipmycase.com/find-and-replace): Find and replace text with support for regular expressions, case-sensitive matching, and whole-word matching. Shows live match highlighting and replacement preview before applying.

- [Add Prefix/Suffix](https://flipmycase.com/add-prefix-suffix): Add custom prefix or suffix to every line of text. Includes preset buttons for common patterns like quotes, parentheses, HTML list items, and CSV formatting.

- [Remove Line Breaks](https://flipmycase.com/remove-line-breaks): Remove line breaks and join all lines with spaces, commas, or any custom separator. Option to preserve paragraph breaks while removing single line breaks.

- [Remove Empty Lines](https://flipmycase.com/remove-empty-lines): Remove blank lines from text. Option to also strip lines that contain only whitespace. Shows before/after line count comparison.

- [Extract Emails](https://flipmycase.com/extract-emails): Extract all email addresses from any text block using regex pattern matching. Deduplicates results, sorts alphabetically, and copies as a clean list.

- [Extract URLs](https://flipmycase.com/extract-urls): Extract all URLs from text with automatic deduplication and domain breakdown statistics. Supports http, https, and www prefixed URLs.

- [Remove HTML Tags](https://flipmycase.com/remove-html-tags): Strip HTML and XML tags from text while preserving the content. Options to keep specific tags, decode HTML entities, and preserve basic formatting.

- [Text to List](https://flipmycase.com/text-to-list): Convert paragraphs and sentences into bullet points, numbered lists, HTML ordered/unordered lists, or Markdown list format.

- [List to Text](https://flipmycase.com/list-to-text): Convert bulleted or numbered lists back to flowing paragraph text. Automatically strips bullets, numbers, dashes, and other list markers.

- [Smart Quotes Converter](https://flipmycase.com/smart-quotes-converter): Convert between curly/typographic quotes and straight quotes. Also handles em dashes and en dashes. Useful for switching between web-ready and plain text formats.

### Font Styles (Unicode Text Generators)

- [Bold Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/bold-text-generator): Generate bold Unicode text (𝗕𝗼𝗹𝗱) that can be copied and pasted into social media bios, posts, and messages where HTML formatting is not available.

- [Italic Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/italic-text-generator): Generate italic Unicode text (𝘐𝘵𝘢𝘭𝘪𝘤) for copy and paste use on platforms that don't support rich text formatting.

- [Bold Italic Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/bold-italic-text-generator): Generate bold italic Unicode text (𝘽𝙤𝙡𝙙 𝙄𝙩𝙖𝙡𝙞𝙘) for emphasis in social media posts and bios.

- [Strikethrough Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/strikethrough-text-generator): Generate strikethrough Unicode text (T̶e̶x̶t̶) using combining characters. Works anywhere Unicode is supported.

- [Underline Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/underline-text-generator): Generate underlined Unicode text (T̲e̲x̲t̲) using combining underline characters for use on platforms without formatting support.

- [Superscript Generator](https://flipmycase.com/superscript-generator): Generate superscript Unicode text (ˢᵘᵖᵉʳˢᶜʳⁱᵖᵗ) for mathematical notation, footnotes, and decorative text.

- [Subscript Generator](https://flipmycase.com/subscript-generator): Generate subscript Unicode text for chemical formulas, mathematical notation, and scientific text.

- [Small Caps Generator](https://flipmycase.com/small-caps-generator): Generate small caps Unicode text (Sᴍᴀʟʟ Cᴀᴘꜱ) for elegant headings and social media styling.

- [Upside Down Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/upside-down-text-generator): Generate upside down text (ʇxǝʇ uʍop ǝpᴉsdn) by mapping characters to their Unicode rotated equivalents.

- [Fancy Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/fancy-text-generator): Generate 12+ Unicode text styles at once — bold, italic, bubble, upside down, wide text, and more. Preview all styles and copy any with one click.

- [Bubble Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/bubble-text-generator): Generate bubble/circled Unicode text (Ⓑⓤⓑⓑⓛⓔ) using enclosed alphanumeric characters.

- [Wide Text Generator](https://flipmycase.com/wide-text-generator): Generate fullwidth vaporwave aesthetic text (Ｗｉｄｅ Ｔｅｘｔ) using Unicode fullwidth characters.

### Developer & Code Tools

- [JSON Formatter](https://flipmycase.com/json-formatter): Format, validate, beautify, and minify JSON with syntax highlighting, tree view, error detection with line numbers, and broken JSON auto-fix. Export to CSV.

- [Regex Tester](https://flipmycase.com/regex-tester): Test regular expressions with real-time match highlighting, capture group display, replace mode, and flag toggles (global, case-insensitive, multiline).

- [Hash Generator](https://flipmycase.com/hash-generator): Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512 hashes from text or file uploads. Compare hashes, HMAC mode, and bulk hashing support.

- [Slug Generator](https://flipmycase.com/slug-generator): Convert any title or text into clean, SEO-friendly URL slugs. Handles accents, special characters, and supports multiple slug formats.

- [YAML Formatter](https://flipmycase.com/yaml-formatter): Format, validate, and convert YAML with bidirectional YAML-to-JSON and JSON-to-YAML conversion. Error detection with line highlighting.

- [XML Formatter](https://flipmycase.com/xml-formatter): Format, beautify, and minify XML with error detection. Customizable indentation (2/4 spaces or tabs).

- [CSV to JSON](https://flipmycase.com/csv-to-json): Bidirectional CSV-to-JSON and JSON-to-CSV converter with auto-detect delimiters, header row options, and pretty print or minified output.

- [Markdown Preview](https://flipmycase.com/markdown-preview): Live Markdown editor with instant rendered preview. Supports tables, code blocks, lists, and more. Export as HTML.

- [SQL Formatter](https://flipmycase.com/sql-formatter): Format SQL queries with uppercase keywords, proper indentation, and minification option. Handles SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, and CREATE statements.

- [HTML to Markdown](https://flipmycase.com/html-to-markdown): Bidirectional converter between HTML and Markdown. Handles headings, lists, links, code blocks, and tables.

- [Cron Expression Builder](https://flipmycase.com/cron-expression-builder): Visual cron expression builder with presets for common schedules, natural language descriptions, and next 5 execution time previews.

- [JWT Decoder](https://flipmycase.com/jwt-decoder): Decode JWT tokens to inspect header and payload claims. Shows expiration status, issued time, algorithm, and all custom claims.

- [CSS Formatter](https://flipmycase.com/css-formatter): Format, beautify, and minify CSS with customizable indent style and comment preservation options.

- [HTML Formatter](https://flipmycase.com/html-formatter): Format, beautify, and minify HTML with proper indentation and customizable spacing options.

- [JavaScript Formatter](https://flipmycase.com/javascript-formatter): Format, beautify, and minify JavaScript code with configurable indent options.

### Analysis & Counting

- [Word Counter](https://flipmycase.com/word-counter): Count words, characters (with and without spaces), sentences, paragraphs, and lines. Calculates reading time, speaking time, keyword density, and social media character limit progress bars.

- [Text Diff](https://flipmycase.com/text-diff): Compare two texts side by side with additions, deletions, and changes highlighted at the word level. Inline and side-by-side view modes.

- [Word Frequency Counter](https://flipmycase.com/word-frequency-counter): Analyze word frequency, bigrams, and trigrams in text. Generate word clouds and export frequency data as CSV.

- [AI Writing Analyzer](https://flipmycase.com/ai-writing-analyzer): Analyze statistical writing patterns including sentence length uniformity, vocabulary diversity, filler phrase usage, and other stylometric signals.

- [Readability Analyzer](https://flipmycase.com/readability-analyzer): Calculate readability scores using Flesch-Kincaid, Gunning Fog, SMOG, Coleman-Liau, ARI, and Dale-Chall formulas. Shows grade level and sentence-by-sentence analysis.

- [Text Statistics](https://flipmycase.com/text-statistics): Comprehensive text analysis dashboard with word frequency, vocabulary richness, lexical density, sentence structure analysis, bigrams, trigrams, and exportable reports.

- [Line Counter](https://flipmycase.com/line-counter): Count total lines, empty lines, and non-empty lines. Shows line length statistics and distribution chart.

### Encoding & Conversion

- [String Encoder](https://flipmycase.com/string-encoder): Encode and decode strings with Base64, URL encoding, HTML entities, Unicode escape sequences, hexadecimal, and binary formats.

- [Number Base Converter](https://flipmycase.com/number-base-converter): Convert between binary (base 2), octal (base 8), decimal (base 10), and hexadecimal (base 16). Includes ASCII text-to-binary/hex mode.

- [Color Code Converter](https://flipmycase.com/color-code-converter): Convert between HEX, RGB, HSL, and CMYK color codes. Includes WCAG contrast ratio checker with pass/fail ratings.

- [Morse Code Translator](https://flipmycase.com/morse-code-translator): Translate text to Morse code and back with audio playback, adjustable speed, and a full reference chart.

- [ROT13 Cipher](https://flipmycase.com/rot13-encoder-decoder): Encode and decode with ROT13, ROT5 (numbers), ROT47 (ASCII), and custom Caesar cipher shift values.

- [Binary Text Converter](https://flipmycase.com/binary-text-converter): Convert text to binary representation and binary back to text. Shows per-character breakdown table with decimal and hex values.

- [Hex Text Converter](https://flipmycase.com/hex-text-converter): Convert text to hexadecimal and hex back to text with per-character breakdown showing decimal and binary equivalents.

- [NATO Phonetic Alphabet](https://flipmycase.com/nato-phonetic-alphabet): Convert text to NATO phonetic alphabet spelling (Alpha, Bravo, Charlie...) with a full reference table.

- [Pig Latin Converter](https://flipmycase.com/pig-latin-converter): Convert English to Pig Latin and back. Preserves punctuation and capitalization patterns.

### Generators

- [Password Generator](https://flipmycase.com/password-generator): Generate strong random passwords with customizable length, character sets (uppercase, lowercase, numbers, symbols), and exclusion rules. Includes password strength meter with crack time estimate.

- [Lorem Ipsum Generator](https://flipmycase.com/lorem-ipsum-generator): Generate placeholder text in 5 styles: classic Lorem Ipsum, Hipster Ipsum, Office Ipsum, Pirate Ipsum, and Cat Ipsum. Control by paragraphs, sentences, or words.

- [Unix Timestamp Converter](https://flipmycase.com/unix-timestamp-converter): Convert Unix/epoch timestamps to human-readable dates and dates to timestamps. Supports seconds and milliseconds with a live updating clock.

- [UUID Generator](https://flipmycase.com/uuid-generator): Generate random UUID v4 identifiers. Bulk generate up to 100 at once, with uppercase/lowercase and hyphen options.

- [Random Number Generator](https://flipmycase.com/random-number-generator): Generate random numbers within custom ranges. Bulk mode for multiple numbers, no-duplicates option, and virtual dice roller.

- [Roman Numeral Converter](https://flipmycase.com/roman-numeral-converter): Convert between Arabic numbers and Roman numerals. Date mode for year conversion and a complete reference table.

- [QR Code Generator](https://flipmycase.com/qr-code-generator): Generate QR codes for URLs, plain text, email addresses, phone numbers, and WiFi credentials. Download as PNG.

- [Emoji Picker](https://flipmycase.com/emoji-picker): Search and browse emojis by name or category. Shows Unicode code points and shortcodes. Click to copy.

- [Unicode Lookup](https://flipmycase.com/unicode-lookup): Search the Unicode character database by name or category. Shows code points, HTML entities, CSS values, and UTF-8 encoding.

### Guides

- [Underscore Guide](https://flipmycase.com/underscore-conventions): Comprehensive guide to underscore conventions in programming — _private variables, __dunder methods, snake_case naming, and trailing underscores with Python and JavaScript examples.

- [All Caps Guide](https://flipmycase.com/all-caps-guide): When ALL CAPS is rude vs necessary — covers uppercase usage rules in emails, social media, code, legal documents, and professional communication.

### Comparison Guides

- [camelCase vs snake_case vs kebab-case](https://flipmycase.com/camelcase-vs-snake-case): Comprehensive comparison of the three most common naming conventions in programming. Covers when to use camelCase (JavaScript, Java, TypeScript), snake_case (Python, Ruby, SQL), and kebab-case (CSS, URLs, HTML attributes). Includes a language-by-language convention table and FAQ on readability, PascalCase, and mixing conventions.

- [Text Tools for Developers](https://flipmycase.com/text-tools-for-developers): Curated directory of 20+ free browser-based developer tools organized by category: code formatters (JSON, CSS, HTML, SQL, XML, YAML), encoding tools (Base64, hex, binary, ROT13), developer utilities (hash generator, regex tester, UUID, JWT decoder, cron builder), and data conversion tools (CSV to JSON, HTML to Markdown, text diff). All tools run client-side with no data transmitted.

- [JSON vs YAML vs XML](https://flipmycase.com/json-vs-yaml-vs-xml): Side-by-side comparison of JSON, YAML, and XML data formats. Covers syntax examples, use cases (APIs vs config files vs enterprise systems), pros and cons of each format, parse speed, file size, comment support, and schema validation. Includes a decision guide for choosing the right format.

---

## Blog Posts

- [How to Convert Text to Uppercase](https://flipmycase.com/blog/uppercase-converter): Guide to ALL CAPS conversion with keyboard shortcuts and use cases.
- [How to Convert Text to Lowercase](https://flipmycase.com/blog/lowercase-converter): Guide to lowercase conversion for data normalization and text processing.
- [Title Case Converter — Rules and Examples](https://flipmycase.com/blog/title-case-converter): Correct title case capitalization rules for headlines and headings.
- [How to Convert Text to Snake_case and Kebab-case](https://flipmycase.com/blog/how-to-convert-text-to-snake-case-kebab-case): Naming convention guide for developers.
- [Text Conversion Guide](https://flipmycase.com/blog/how-to-convert-text-to-different-formats): Complete guide to all text format conversions.
- [Free Word Counter Guide](https://flipmycase.com/blog/word-counter-guide): How to count words, characters, and reading time.
- [Text Cleaner Guide](https://flipmycase.com/blog/text-cleaner-guide): How to clean and format messy text online.
- [Lorem Ipsum Guide](https://flipmycase.com/blog/lorem-ipsum-guide): Placeholder text for designers and developers.
- [Duplicate Remover Guide](https://flipmycase.com/blog/duplicate-remover-guide): How to remove duplicate lines from text and lists.
- [String Encoder Guide](https://flipmycase.com/blog/string-encoder-guide): Base64, URL, and HTML encoding/decoding explained.
- [JSON Formatter Guide](https://flipmycase.com/blog/json-formatter-guide): How to format, validate, and fix JSON.
- [Text Diff Guide](https://flipmycase.com/blog/text-diff-guide): How to compare texts and find differences.
- [Password Generator Guide](https://flipmycase.com/blog/password-generator-guide): Strong passwords, passphrases, and PINs.
- [Hash Generator Guide](https://flipmycase.com/blog/hash-generator-guide): MD5, SHA-256, SHA-512 hashing explained.
- [Regex Tester Guide](https://flipmycase.com/blog/regex-tester-guide): How to test regular expressions online.
- [How to Convert Text to Uppercase (detailed)](https://flipmycase.com/blog/how-to-convert-text-to-uppercase): Extended guide with code examples.
